languages.text: {n}Техножрец вперивается взглядом в Эоганна, покачивая головой из стороны в сторону.{/n} "Ты заблуждаешься. Но я спасу и тебя, ведь святость моя неизбывна..."
{n}The Tech-Priest fixes Eogunn with a piercing stare, shaking his head from side to side.{/n} "You are mistaken. But I will save you as well, for my sanctity is absolute..."
languages.original_text: {n}Техножрец вперивается взглядом в Эоганна, покачивая головой из стороны в сторону.{/n} "Ты заблуждаешься. Но я спасу и тебя, ведь святость моя неизбывна..."

traits.locale_text: {n}The Tech-Priest fixes Eogunn with a piercing stare, shaking his head from side to side.{/n} "You are mistaken. But I will save you as well, for my sanctity is absolute..."
{n}The Tech-Priest fixes Eogunn with a piercing stare, shaking his head from side to side.{/n} "You are mistaken. But I will save you as well, for my sanctity is absolute..."
{n}The Tech-Priest fixes Eogunn with a piercing stare, shaking his head from side to side.{/n} "You are mistaken. But I will save you as well, for my sanctity is absolute..."
{n}The Tech-Priest fixes Eogunn with a piercing stare, shaking his head from side to side.{/n} "You are mistaken. But I will save you as well, for my sanctity is absolute..."

languages.text: {n}El tecnosacerdote fija en Eogunn una mirada penetrante mientras sacude la cabeza.{/n} «Se equivoca. Pero le salvaré a usted también, pues mi santidad es absoluta...».
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest fixes Eogunn with a piercing stare, shaking his head from side to side.{/n} "You are mistaken. But I will save you as well, for my sanctity is absolute..."

traits.locale_text: {n}El tecnosacerdote fija en Eogunn una mirada penetrante mientras sacude la cabeza.{/n} «Se equivoca. Pero le salvaré a usted también, pues mi santidad es absoluta...».

languages.text: {n}技术神甫以锐利的目光盯着伊奥贡，缓缓摇了摇头。{/n}“你错了。但我还是会拯救你，因为我的神圣性是绝对的……”
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest fixes Eogunn with a piercing stare, shaking his head from side to side.{/n} "You are mistaken. But I will save you as well, for my sanctity is absolute..."

traits.locale_text: {n}技术神甫以锐利的目光盯着伊奥贡，缓缓摇了摇头。{/n}“你错了。但我还是会拯救你，因为我的神圣性是绝对的……”

languages.text: {n}Der Techpriester fixiert Eogunn mit einem durchdringenden Blick und schüttelt den Kopf.{/n} "Ihr irrt Euch. Aber ich werde auch Euch retten, denn meine Heiligkeit ist absolut ..."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest fixes Eogunn with a piercing stare, shaking his head from side to side.{/n} "You are mistaken. But I will save you as well, for my sanctity is absolute..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Techpriester fixiert Eogunn mit einem durchdringenden Blick und schüttelt den Kopf.{/n} "Ihr irrt Euch. Aber ich werde auch Euch retten, denn meine Heiligkeit ist absolut ..."

languages.text: {n}Le technoprêtre fixe Eogunn d'un regard perçant tout en secouant la tête.{/n} « Vous vous trompez, mais je vous sauverai vous aussi, car ma sainteté est absolue... »
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest fixes Eogunn with a piercing stare, shaking his head from side to side.{/n} "You are mistaken. But I will save you as well, for my sanctity is absolute..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le technoprêtre fixe Eogunn d'un regard perçant tout en secouant la tête.{/n} « Vous vous trompez, mais je vous sauverai vous aussi, car ma sainteté est absolue... »

languages.text: {n}Tekno Rahip, delici bir bakışla Eogunn'a kilitlenip başını iki yana sallıyor.{/n} "Yanılıyorsun. Fakat seni de kurtaracağım, zira benim kutsallığım mutlaktır..."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest fixes Eogunn with a piercing stare, shaking his head from side to side.{/n} "You are mistaken. But I will save you as well, for my sanctity is absolute..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tekno Rahip, delici bir bakışla Eogunn'a kilitlenip başını iki yana sallıyor.{/n} "Yanılıyorsun. Fakat seni de kurtaracağım, zira benim kutsallığım mutlaktır..."

languages.text: {n}テクプリストはエオグンを鋭い視線で捉え、首を左右に振る。{/n}「君が間違っている。しかし、聖なる私のために、君も救う。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest fixes Eogunn with a piercing stare, shaking his head from side to side.{/n} "You are mistaken. But I will save you as well, for my sanctity is absolute..."
